name: itsribbZ-godspeed
description: Structured prompt protocol pack for Claude Code. Ships a skill + hooks that load a detailed instruction set when the word 'godspeed' appears in a prompt.

plugins.name: godspeed
plugins.description: The godspeed methodology as a plugin — Brain severity classifier (S0-S5 routing), Homer multi-agent orchestrator (Zeus + 3 MUSES + Oracle critic + Mnemos memory + Sybil advisor), 5 lifecycle hooks, 11 skills, 1 slash command. Fires on 'godspeed' — scores the prompt, auto-dispatches parallel Sonnet workers for S3+ tasks, critic-gates the synthesis, persists to a vector-embedded memory. Self-contained install. Methodology, not personal config — meant to be forked and extended.
